series_metadata.series_title: Civil Rights and Title VII Files
series_metadata.series_description: Documents containing complaints and hearing information, ie,. conciliation agreements and consent orders, EEO civil rights files, letters of determination, mediation settlement agreements, and requests for withdrawals of change of discrimination. Please note, electronic forms of the files are stored in OAKS within the employees ePAR.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 7 years after the case the documents support is closed, then destroy., Paper: Shred
